candidate_definition_hints.text: Project AirSim is Microsoft's evolution of AirSim, an advanced simulation platform for building, training, and testing autonomous systems in high-fidelity virtual environments
Project AirSim is a simulation platform for drones, robots, and other autonomous systems.
